title: gymnadenia conopsea var. graminea
intro: Gymnadenia conopsea var. graminea, also known as the grass-leaved summer lady's tresses, is a type of orchid found in Europe, with a preference for alpine and subalpine regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Gymnadenia conopsea var. graminea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or making a tincture, though it's essential to consult with a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
